title: DeliveryTextClassifierOut
description:
Schema for the JSON object returned by `prompts/delivery_text_classifier_prompt.md`. Mirrors `DeliveryTextClassifierOut` in `crates/clawd/src/semantic_judge.rs` and is enforced by `delivery_text_classifier_schema_drift` in the same file.

This classifier judges a candidate final-facing text on two axes at once: whether it is still a meta/process fragment, and whether it is publishable as meaningful user-facing content. All six fields are expected on every successful JSON reply; runtime clamps confidence into [0,1] after schema validation.

is_meta_instruction.description: True when the text is primarily process guidance, placeholder text, or reopens target/permission collection.

meta_reason.description: Short stable rationale such as `process_guidance_fragment`, `user_facing_result`, or `delivery_token`.

meta_confidence.description: Self-rated confidence in the meta-instruction classification.

publishable.description: True when the text carries meaningful user-facing information and can be delivered directly.

publishable_reason.description: Short stable rationale such as `meaningful_result`, `trivial_ack`, or `planner_artifact`.

publishable_confidence.description: Self-rated confidence in the publishable classification.
